pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.7 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and relies on Spring Framework 5, which is incompatible with the target JDK version and modern Spring ecosystem.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping it at 17 would result in incorrect bytecode generation or build failures if strict compiler checks are enabled.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud dependencies to 2023.0.0 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is designed for Spring Boot 2.x; using it with Spring Boot 3.x causes classpath conflicts and runtime failures due to API changes in Spring Framework 6.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set Lombok version to 1.18.30 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may have bugs or lack support for Java 21 language features, potentially causing annotation processing failures or runtime issues.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Remove the deprecated @EnableCircuitBreaker annotation and its import.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.why_exists: The annotation may be removed or deprecated in newer Spring Cloud versions, causing compile errors or warnings if the dependency is no longer present or compatible.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Remove the deprecated @EnableEurekaClient annotation and its import.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.why_exists: Eureka client support has been deprecated/removed in newer Spring Cloud versions; keeping the annotation causes compile errors if the dependency is removed.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Add import for HttpStatus to support explicit status code setting in response.
Change return type from Double to CurrencyConversion to return the full object instead of just the factor.
Update response body to return the full CurrencyConversion object and set status explicitly.
Add logging statement to log the conversion factor value.
Remove the getDataFallBack method which is no longer needed.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Remove Spring Cloud Config client configuration block.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
cloud:
  config:
    discovery:
      enabled: true 
      service-id: config-server

eureka:
  client:
    serviceUrl:
      defaultZone: ${EUREKA_URI:http://localhost:8761/eureka}
    region: default
    registryFetchIntervalSeconds: 5

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Actuator management endpoint exposure configuration.
